title: Top-class eventing at George Riding Club this weekend
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George Riding Club (GRC)...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - The George Riding Club (GRC) will host the Western Cape Eventing Championships this weekend from Friday to Sunday, 17 to 19 October.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - The George Riding Club (GRC) will host the Western Cape Eventing Championships this weekend from Friday to Sunday, 17 to 19 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event promises an action-packed experience for the whole family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eventing, often called the \"triathlon of horse riding\", is one of the most challenging and thrilling equestrian disciplines as it tests every aspect of a horse and rider's partnership - precision, athleticism and courage.","html":"Eventing, often called the \"triathlon of horse riding\", is one of the most challenging and thrilling equestrian disciplines as it tests every aspect of a horse and rider's partnership - precision, athleticism and courage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It combines dressage, showjumping and cross-country and is a sport of strategy, stamina and mutual trust, whether at local level or international competitions like the Olympics.","html":"It combines dressage, showjumping and cross-country and is a sport of strategy, stamina and mutual trust, whether at local level or international competitions like the Olympics."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This year, the GRC has partnered with George Municipality and George Tourism to stage a memorable event showcasing top riders and horses from across the country as they compete for provincial honours."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spectators may expect a great atmosphere with free entry, food stalls and a fully stocked bar. Whether you are a horse enthusiast or simply looking for a fun day out in the fresh air, there will be something for everyone to enjoy.","html":"Spectators may expect a great atmosphere with free entry, food stalls and a fully stocked bar. Whether you are a horse enthusiast or simply looking for a fun day out in the fresh air, there will be something for everyone to enjoy."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"This is going to be a spectacular event,\" said the GRC's Gaby Berman. \"It's a chance to experience the thrill of eventing up close while enjoying a family-friendly day in George.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, contact the George Riding Club at [email protected].","html":"For more information, contact the George Riding Club at [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The GRC encourages the community to come out and support the event, which promises a weekend of sport, prestige, dedication and plenty of adrenaline.","html":"The GRC encourages the community to come out and support the event, which promises a weekend of sport, prestige, dedication and plenty of adrenaline."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spectators may look forward to a great show of top-class riding.","html":"Spectators may look forward to a great show of top-class riding."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
